---
name: 🚀 Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for OpenBridge
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, good first issue
assignees: ""
---

## 💡 Feature Description

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe it. (e.g., "I'm always frustrated when...")

## 🎯 Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. How should this feature behave or look?

## 🎨 Design Context / Mockups

Add any links, drawings, or screenshots showing how the feature would interface with the existing workspace panels.

## ➕ Additional Context

Any other context or links about the feature request here.
